data.title: Sen. Warren blasts Trump for broken promises, accuses him of raising costs; Trump family reportedly gains $5 billion in crypto venture.
data.description: On Friday, Senator Elizabeth Warren criticized President Donald Trump for failing to deliver on promises to reduce costs, accusing him of increasing expenses for Americans. Warren accused Trump of being dishonest and pointed to rising prices for groceries, gas, school supplies, and baby strollers. She stated that instead of lowering grocery expenses, Trump's tariff policies have raised costs for consumers. Additionally, Warren mentioned that the Trump family's investment in World Liberty Financial's WLFI token reportedly increased their wealth by approximately $5 billion following its trading launch.

data.title: Rackspace Technology granted inducement equity awards to new CEO Gajen Kandiah on Sept 4, 2025 under Nasdaq rule.
data.description: On September 4, 2025, Rackspace Technology®, a leading provider of hybrid cloud and AI solutions, disclosed that they awarded inducement equity awards to Gajen Kandiah upon his appointment as the new Chief Executive Officer. The awards were granted as part of his recruitment package and reflect the company's confidence in his leadership. Rackspace Technology® (NASDAQ: RXT) continues to strengthen its team with key individuals, reinforcing its position in the market.

data.title: Litecoin clashes with influencer in a war of words over price movements and personal appearance.
data.description: Litecoin responded to Benjamin Cowen's criticism of its price performance by humorously poking fun at his hairline, teasing, "It reminds us of the great recession." The incident garnered attention as they engaged in banter over cryptocurrency with many viewers. Reactions were mixed to this exchange, with some finding it amusing while others thought it was unprofessional. The incident achieved significant social media engagement, with the video receiving over 10,000 views and sparking discussions among the crypto community. This playful interaction highlights the dynamic and sometimes lighthearted nature of online discourse surrounding cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Toro posts Q3 results with net sales of $1.13 billion, net earnings of $53.5 million, adjusted earnings rise to $122.5 million.
data.description: In the fiscal third quarter, The Toro Company (NYSE: TTC) reported net sales of $1.13 billion, showing a 2% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the analyst estimate of $1.16 billion. Net earnings dropped to $53.5 million from $119.3 million, resulting in diluted earnings per share of 54 cents. This included a noncash impairment charge of 62 cents per share, equating to $81 million pretax. Adjusted net earnings were $122.5 million, slightly lower than the $123.7 million from a year ago; however, adjusted diluted earnings per share rose by 5% to $1.24, surpassing the $1.22 estimate. The company exceeded expectations with their third-quarter adjusted earnings, particularly within their Professional segment.

data.title: Midea Group introduces SPACE MASTER appliances at IFA 2025, focusing on space efficiency with "Same Size, Big Surprise" concept. #Midea #IFA2025
data.description: On September 6, 2025, in Berlin, the Midea Group, a Fortune Global 500 company for 2025, showcased its SPACE MASTER appliances at IFA 2025. The series, emphasizing "Same Size, Big Surprise," revolutionizes the amount of usable space offered to users.

data.title: Labor market sluggish in summer. August sees addition of 22K jobs. Revised data shows 13K job loss in June, first since Dec 2020.
data.description: In August, employers increased their workforce by 22,000 jobs. Additionally, revised data revealed that in June, there was a decrease of 13,000 jobs, marking the initial overall loss in employment since December 2020.

data.title: Bitcoin is forecasted to reach $113,500-$120,000 in next 4 weeks, with resistance at $117,544 and support at $107,255.
data.description: Analysis of Bitcoin's technical indicators indicates a potential increase to $113,500 in the short term and $120,000 in the medium term. Key resistance is noted at $117,544, while critical support stands at $107,255.

data.title: Cathie Wood predicts AI boom and Trump's policies could push GDP growth to 7% and inflation may fall to zero or negative. Tech innovations cited to drive deflation.
data.description: Cathie Wood, the CEO of ARK Invest, predicts that advancements in AI and other technologies will lead to a historic productivity boom in the US, potentially causing inflation to drop to zero or even become negative. Wood explains that innovation driven by technology is deflationary in nature, mentioning AI, robotics, energy storage, multiomics, and blockchain as key factors. She emphasizes that the learning curves associated with these technologies will decrease costs, leading to a deflationary impact. Wood believes that the speed of change in these fields will be significant in the coming years. This article suggests the transformational impact of technology on the economy and potential implications for inflation rates and consumer costs.

data.title: Revive Therapeutics extends private placement offering to $650,000 with potential additional $589,000 worth of units.
data.description: Revive Therapeutics Ltd. (RVVTF) (RVV) (31R) has decided to extend its previous private placement offering, which initially consisted of up to 30,952,381 units priced at $0.021 per unit, with the potential to generate up to $650,000 in gross proceeds. The company successfully concluded the first phase of this offering in August 2025 by issuing 2,900,000 units, raising $60,900. With this success, Revive can now potentially secure an additional $589,000 through the remaining units available for purchase in this private placement opportunity.

data.title: Deal sealed: Trump Media buys 684.4M CRO tokens in a $6.4B transaction to establish a crypto treasury in joint venture.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Trump Media has agreed to acquire 684.4 million CRO tokens as a component of their collaboration with the exchange. This partnership aims to establish a cryptocurrency treasury, marking a significant move in the digital asset space.

data.title: Endava (NYSE: DAVA) Q4 results: earnings beat at 32 cents per share, sales at $249.310 million. FY2026 target EPS of $1.11-$1.27 and sales of $1.013 billion-$1.033 billion. Strategic focus on AI.
data.description: Endava (NYSE: DAVA) revealed its fourth-quarter results, showcasing both positive and negative aspects of its performance. The company reported earnings of 32 cents per share, surpassing the projected 16 cents per share by analysts. Nonetheless, its quarterly sales stood at $249.310 million, slightly below the forecasted $249.950 million. Looking ahead to FY2026, Endava anticipated an adjusted EPS ranging between $1.11 and $1.27, exceeding the market's estimations of 85 cents per share. The company also predicted sales in the vicinity of $1.013 billion to $1.033 billion, while analysts had estimated $1.020 billion. Endava highlighted the growing significance of AI within its client base, noting that over half of its employees are now involved in projects utilizing AI technology.

data.title: Midea Group presents new XPRESS MASTER kitchen tech at IFA 2025, targeting busy lifestyles. Fortune Global 500 company.
data.description: On September 6, 2025, in Berlin, the Midea Group, a Fortune Global 500 company for the year 2025, showcased its latest innovation in kitchen technologies known as XPRESS MASTER. This new technology is designed to cater to individuals who have busy schedules and prioritize efficiency without sacrificing quality. The XPRESS MASTER aims to streamline kitchen tasks for those juggling work meetings, school pick-ups, and rush-hour commutes.

data.title: Former Louisiana Attorney General initiates investigation into LuxUrban Hotels Inc., OTC ticker LUXH.
data.description: In a recent statement on September 5, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana who is currently a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that the law firm has initiated an inquiry into LuxUrban Hotels Inc. (OTC: LUXH). This investigation, which began in November 2023, aims to delve into the operations and practices of LuxUrban Hotels Inc. The specific focus and details of the investigation remain undisclosed at this time.

data.title: Administration withdraws Biden's plan requiring airlines to compensate for flight delays; important change impacting airline passengers.
data.description: The current administration announced the decision to withdraw the plan put in place by the previous administration under President Joseph R. Biden Jr. This plan required airlines to provide compensation to passengers for disruptions caused by the airline. The specifics of the compensation and the extent of the disruptions were not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Hesai Group launches global offering of 17 million shares, including 1.7 million in Hong Kong Public Offering (NASDAQ: HSAI).
data.description: Hesai Group, a prominent player in lidar solutions, has disclosed the commencement of its Global Offering involving 17,000,000 Class B ordinary shares. This offering includes a Hong Kong Public Offering of 1,700,000 shares starting on September 8, 2025, and an International Offering of 15,300,000 shares. Furthermore, the company will list its Class B ordinary shares on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited with the stock code "2525."

data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticizes Fed, calls for reform as Trump considers Powell's replacement, citing inflation and inequality; urges nonpartisan review. Fed's powers should be overhauled, according to Bessent, who argues its policies have enriched the wealthy and worsened housing affordability.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has intensified his critique of the Federal Reserve by calling for significant reforms, alleging that the central bank is fueling inflation and disparity. This criticism comes amid President Donald Trump's contemplation of potential replacements for Fed Chair Jerome Powell. In an op-ed for The Wall Street Journal, Bessent advocated for a comprehensive assessment of the Fed, encompassing its ability to determine interest rates, regulatory duties, and internal processes. He proposed that the Fed should relinquish bank oversight responsibilities to other entities and cease bond acquisitions except in emergencies. Bessent emphasized the necessity for the Fed to alter its trajectory, asserting that its strategies have exacerbated wealth inequality and played a role in the affordability crisis within the U.S. housing market. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETH price remains strong amidst concerns from traders about US macro. Onchain activity and options sentiment indicate possible price recovery.
data.description: The price of Ether is demonstrating strength amidst high onchain activity and a balanced sentiment in options, suggesting a possible recovery in its price.

data.title: Analysts lower forecasts for Science Applications Int'l due to Q2 results. Sales declined by 3% to $1.77 billion, missing estimates. EPS beat expectations at $3.63. Revised revenue outlook for 2026 stands at $7.25-$7.325 billion, below consensus estimates. Adjusted EPS outlook revised to $9.40-$9.60, surpassing forecasts.
data.description: Science Applications International (SAIC) announced its second-quarter results, which showed a 3% decline in quarterly sales to $1.77 billion, missing the expected $1.86 billion. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $3.63, surpassing the estimated $2.24. SAIC also adjusted its 2026 revenue forecast to $7.250-$7.325 billion, down from the previous $7.60-$7.75 billion, falling short of the anticipated $7.65 billion. However, the revised annual adjusted EPS outlook is now $9.40-$9.60, up from the earlier $9.10-$9.30 and exceeding the expected $9.17. Note that these figures are subject to change based on future developments. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
